subcodes.title: Khoekhoegowab: ≠KHAM-KHOEN
subcodes.first_line:
## Khoekhoegowab: ≠KHAM-KHOEN

Ai Elōtse ne ≠kham-khoë !gâra ≠gaete mare, tsî /khomxa ≠gaosib ne /gâsa gurusabena /khair
subcodes.notes: Theory: Khoekhoegowab youth prayer (section KHAM-KHOEN = Youth) -- "O God, look with mercy upon the youth..." Possibly AB10703RAD (youth prayer) or similar. Challenge: Khoisan click consonants.
